zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Sayre於1346年出生在英國諾福爾可霍頓 霍爾時，他的父親William Sayre I47歲，母親Eva Johua41歲。他於1382年與Ann de Kent在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1431年在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁桑可頓享年85歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sayre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Surrey): variant of   Sayer  .

variants.name: Sayer
meanings: English: common occupational name from Middle English sayer, a phonetic variant of Sawyer , which in Wales and neighboring English counties may have been reinforced by the synonymous Welsh saer ‘carpenter’ and everywhere by a possible borrowing into Middle English of Old French seieor, saieur ‘sawyer’.

English: rare occupational name perhaps denoting an assayer of metals, or a servant who tasted his lord's food before serving, from Middle English saiour ‘assayer, tester’ (a shortened form of Old French assaiour, ultimately from Late Latin exagium, a derivative of exagmināre ‘to weigh’).
English: rare occupational name for a professional reciter or minstrel, from Middle English seier(e) ‘speaker’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Sayre was born in 1346, in Houghton Hall, Norfolk, England, his father, William Sayre I, was 47 and his mother, Eva Johua, was 41. He married Ann de Kent in 1382, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1431, in Sancton, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Sayre est né en 1346, à Houghton Hall, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Sayre I, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Eva Johua, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Ann de Kent en 1382, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1431, à Sancton, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Sayre 1346 in Houghton Hall, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Sayre I 47 und seine Mutter Eva Johua 41. Er hat 1382 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Ann de Kent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1431 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Sancton, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Houghton, Sancton, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 산크턴
ko.lifeSummary: Adam Sayre(이)가 1346년 영국 노르폴크 허그h턴 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sayre I(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Eva Johua(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Ann de Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 산크턴에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Ann de Kent em 1382, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.Houghton, Sancton, Yorkshire, England: санктон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Sayre родился в 1346 г. в местности хоугтон холл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Sayre I было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva Johua, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann de Kent в 1382 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1431 г. в местности санктон, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.
